title: acalypha neomexicana
intro: Acalypha neomexicana, also known as New Mexico copperleaf, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acalypha neomexicana include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
